Macro conversion would be at a basket and get me to the next stage. And then that has a big impact on the overall journey. And when I look at conversion rate optimization, which is something which I first came into at around 2005, 2006, I'm always looking at how can I get the person from one step to the next. But just think about it, you've just landed on here, you've been searching for men's watches. focus on your call call to action, and then make it clear for customers to get what they want and make it as seamless as possible. So they're the key things that you should be taking away from this.
